message:
fix: use LookupEnv for GT_AGENT to prevent tmux env contamination (gt-ff66)

buildRestartCommand used os.Getenv which returns empty string for both
unset and explicitly-empty GT_AGENT. This caused the tmux fallback to
activate even when the test explicitly cleared GT_AGENT, reading a stale
value from the real tmux session and bypassing role_agents resolution.

Switch to os.LookupEnv to only fall back to tmux when GT_AGENT is truly
absent from the process environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
